transcription.text: Deck the halls with boughs of holly, fa-la-la-la-la-la-la-la. Tis the season to be jolly, fa-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la. Don we now our gay apparel, fa-la-la-la-la-la-la-la. This Christmas music is brought to you by a 12-piece set of Revere Ware Cookery, famous for its copper or stainless steel even heating bottoms at only $89.99. And the housewares department at the Broadway. Fa-la-la-la-la-la, follow me and marry me. Fa-la-la-la-la-la, follow me and marry me.
